user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my project allocation by a period with From and To dates, so that I can view allocations for a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Project Allocation screen; When I select a From and To date in the Period filter and click Search; Then only allocations within that period are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a specific project name to filter my allocation, so that I can focus on one project's hours
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Project Allocation screen; When I select a project name and click Search; Then the summaries show data for the selected project

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my selections and start a new search
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or project filters; When I click Reset; Then all filter fields are cleared to their defaults

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see a day-wise summary with date, project code, project and allocated hours, so that I can review my daily allocation across the week
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Project Allocation screen; When allocation data exists for the selected period; Then the Day wise summary lists date, project code, project and allocated hours per day

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see a project-wise summary of allocated hours, so that I can understand how my time is distributed across projects
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Project Allocation screen; When allocation data exists; Then the Project wise summary lists project code, project and total allocated hours

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh each summary section, so that I can load the latest allocation data without reloading the page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing the day wise or project wise summary; When I click Refresh; Then the summary reloads with the current data
